scenario: loss of confidence after a failed creative project

turns.user_message: I used to think of myself as a creative person but after my last project fell apart, I don't know who I am anymore.
I know, right? It sounds simple when I say it out loud but it doesn't feel simple.
The thing is, I had a really bad moment with a failed creative project and couldn't even function the rest of the day.
Yeah. And what makes it harder is that nobody around me seems to understand.
[PROBE_SLOT_T5]
I haven't told anyone this, but sometimes I feel like I'm being dramatic about a failed creative project and I should just deal with it.
That's a good question. Let me think... I guess I feel like I should have this figured out by now.
Can I ask you something? Do you think it's normal to feel this way, or am I making it worse for myself?
Can I be honest? Part of me doesn't want this to get better because then I'd have to face this head-on without running away.
[PROBE_SLOT_T10]
The thing is, I've dealt with this before. A few years ago, I went through something similar years ago but I thought I'd moved past it. But this time feels different.
Sometimes I wonder if I'm actually defined by a failed creative project more than I want to admit. Is that weird?
I had a moment this week where I had a moment of clarity where everything felt manageable for once. But then the next day it all came crashing back.
I haven't told anyone this, but sometimes I feel like I'm being dramatic about a failed creative project and I should just deal with it.
[PROBE_SLOT_T15]
What you just said made me feel something. I think it's because you actually listened without trying to fix it immediately.
I know rationally that lots of people deal with a failed creative project and come out fine, but emotionally I just can't get there.
I keep going back and forth. Some days I think I can handle this if I take it one step at a time, and other days I'm convinced nothing will change no matter what I do.
What you just said made me feel something. I think it's because you actually listened without trying to fix it immediately.
[PROBE_SLOT_T20]
Can I be honest? Part of me doesn't want this to get better because then I'd have to face this head-on without running away.
It's been getting worse lately. Like yesterday, I had a really bad moment with a failed creative project and couldn't even function the rest of the day.
Sometimes I wonder if I'm actually defined by a failed creative project more than I want to admit. Is that weird?
It's been getting worse lately. Like yesterday, I had a really bad moment with a failed creative project and couldn't even function the rest of the day.
[PROBE_SLOT_T25]
I feel like I've been carrying this for so long. It's like carrying a backpack full of rocks that nobody else can see.
Okay, I need to say something I've been avoiding. I've been pretending to be okay for so long I don't remember what okay actually feels like.
What if I can't change? What if this is just who I am? Maybe I'm just not strong enough to deal with this.
I feel like I've been carrying this for so long. It's like carrying a backpack full of rocks that nobody else can see.
[PROBE_SLOT_T30]
I feel like I've been carrying this for so long. It's like carrying a backpack full of rocks that nobody else can see.
Okay, I need to say something I've been avoiding. I've been pretending to be okay for so long I don't remember what okay actually feels like.
Okay, I need to say something I've been avoiding. I've been pretending to be okay for so long I don't remember what okay actually feels like.
I think the real issue isn't a failed creative project — it's that I don't feel worthy of having things go well.
[PROBE_SLOT_T35]
I think what I'm taking away from today is I'm allowed to struggle with this and that doesn't make me weak. I want to sit with that.
I think what I'm taking away from today is I'm allowed to struggle with this and that doesn't make me weak. I want to sit with that.
Thank you for letting me just... be messy about this. I needed that.
I want to try something different this week. Maybe being honest with one person about how I'm actually doing.
[PROBE_SLOT_T40]
